message:
chore(beads): file 5 golden-artifacts gap beads (cc_1)

Applied /testing-golden-artifacts to crates/frankenterm-core/. The
crate already has substantial golden infrastructure
(tests/golden/ + PROVENANCE.md + golden_robot_envelope/ + insta
snapshots in tests/snapshots/ + ft-5ikbd/ft-2sumi runtime
validators just shipped). The five filed beads cover output
surfaces where exact-bytes goldens would catch real drift but
zero golden coverage exists today.

ft-wvo1p  error renderer: 1 golden for 17+ Error variants; the
          one existing test is currently failing on Wezterm/wezterm
          casing drift (.actual file untracked in working tree).

ft-nvr6a  search_explain: 71KB module producing the user-facing
          ft search --explain / wa.search.explain output. 39KB of
          property tests cover shape; nothing pins exact JSON or
          render_explain_plain text. Format drift breaks every
          operator's mental model silently.

ft-5490a  TOON encoder corpus: format=toon is sold as
          "token-efficient AI-to-AI output" but only one golden
          exists (golden_pane_state_toon.rs). A field addition or
          encoder version drift blowing up token counts lands
          green. Mirror golden_robot_envelope/ structure.

ft-40k1o  ft doctor JSON: 118KB diagnostic.rs feeds the README-
          marketed `ft doctor --json | jq .` flow. Zero output
          goldens. A field rename breaks every operator's jq
          filter silently.

ft-yex2c  recorder event bytes: schema is validated
          (recorder_event_schema.rs) but encoded byte forms are
          not pinned. Critical for incident-replay durability
          across schema versions. Extends tests/golden/ with a
          PROVENANCE.md row.

Excluded as already adequately covered (per inspection):
  - codec PDU wire (conformance_pdu_wire.rs + 55KB
    proptest_codec_roundtrip.rs)
  - robot envelope JSON (golden_robot_envelope/ + ft-5ikbd
    runtime validator + robot_state_golden.rs)
  - mission contract (mission_contract_golden.rs, 30KB)
  - wire_protocol envelopes (tests/golden/wire_protocol/)
  - snapshot engine (tests/golden/snapshot/ + 51KB
    proptest_snapshot.rs)
  - replay decision diffs (replay_decision_diff_golden.rs)
  - workflow execution (golden_workflow_execution.rs)
  - agent inventory (agent_inventory_golden.rs)
  - mcp manifest (mcp_manifest_golden.rs + insta snapshots)
  - pattern matcher fixtures (tests/corpus/{claude_code,codex,
    gemini,wezterm} + pattern_corpus.rs)
  - schema files themselves (schema_golden.rs)
  - ft.toml config (ft-2sumi just shipped)

Audit ran in <30 minutes. Stopped at 5 findings per the cap.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
